kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

test.name: TC-API-04

kw.name: Open Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Opens the application

kw.name: Open a Savings Account with Valid Details
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Register With Valid Credentials
kw.doc: Test case to verify login with valid credentials @

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@id='type']' by index 0.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.

kw.name: Get List Items
kw.doc: Returns all labels or values of selection list ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
This keyword opens a savings account with valid details. @

kw.name: Get Customer Id
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=bank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
Getting the customer id of the logged in user @

kw.name: Get all Accounts of Customer
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=bank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Response : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/customers/12878/accounts status=200, reason=OK headers={'Date': 'Sat, 20 Jun 2026 08:37:16 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-RAY': 'a0e973592c83d9cf-FRA'} body=[{"id":14343,"customerId":12878,"type":"CHECKING","balance":-184.50},{"id":14787,"customerId":12878,"type":"CHECKING","balance":300.00},{"id":14898,"customerId":12878,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":15231,"customerId":12878,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":15564,"customerId":12878,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":15675,"customerId":12878,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=bank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Response : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/transfer?amount=100&fromAccountId=14343&toAccountId=15675 status=200, reason=OK headers={'Date': 'Sat, 20 Jun 2026 08:37:22 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-RAY': 'a0e9737ff881d299-FRA'} body=Successfully transferred $100 from account #14343 to account #15675
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Tranfer funds between account through API @

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Close Application
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closing the application
